subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-31 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Take note of how, in the churches and synagogues, we have established the truth of Islam, and consider the calumnies
subcodes.first_line_orig: ببینید ما چگونه در کنائس یهود و نصاری اثبات حقیقت اسلام نمودیم با وجود این مسلمین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
